summary: Formal M7 content lock acceptance Human Gate package is ready for independent QA review. Lead recommendation is APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS as a product-owner decision option, not an agent approval. The task must remain unclosed and not content-locked until explicit product-owner approval is recorded.

tests_run.result: Branch codex/m7-content-lock-acceptance; status before package writes was M project/tasks/active/M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001.json.

Changed paths are project process/message/task/model-routing/goal-mode files only; no apps/packages/content-source/tools/.github/docs Gate/roadmap/manifest files changed.

decisions.decision: Recommend product owner choose APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS for M7 Beta content lock as of origin/main 62e3c756199f50302ff3b0a5ee087da1fd0bffbe, if the owner accepts the listed limits and exclusions.
This recommendation is not a formal content lock approval; only an explicit product-owner decision can approve or reject content lock.

If approved, autonomous post-lock work should be limited to defect fixes, compatibility fixes, and explicit balance tuning; no new large system, content expansion, release/commercial/branding, telemetry, server, cloud, or mod decision is authorized.
M6_GATE remains PASS_WITH_LIMITS; Alpha/local evidence limits and unsigned Windows desktop smoke limitations are preserved.
DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE remains in force and content lock cannot reverse it or make manual node battle a M7/M8 blocker.

M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 is CLOSED with systems and QA review evidence, but it is prerequisite evidence only, not M7 Gate PASS, release readiness, production art/culture approval, or manual human acceptance.
Edge/Firefox remain blocked-by-tooling rows; Windows DPI 150% remains a follow-up row. No full platform coverage claim is made.
Manual playthrough evidence is agent-operated local preview evidence only and not product-owner manual acceptance.

Cloud-save implementation, accounts/secrets/network persistence, release/commercial/branding, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, irreversible migration, and major cultural-risk decisions remain Human Gates.

risks.summary: No product-owner approval has been recorded; the task cannot close as content locked and must remain BLOCKED or PARTIAL after QA package review.
Beta culture review is accepted as evidence only; production art/culture decisions and major cultural-risk choices remain gated.
Edge and Firefox matrix rows are unresolved until tooling/projects are added and evidence rerun.
Windows DPI 150% remains follow-up evidence, not passed coverage.
Performance evidence includes low-end Windows proxy limitations and is not signed release hardware certification.
Agent-operated manual playthrough evidence does not equal product-owner manual acceptance.

blockers.summary: Explicit product-owner decision is required: APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or REQUEST_CHANGES. Until then the task cannot be CLOSED and content lock is not accepted.

requested_action: Read-only QA review: verify the package is evidence-backed, truthful about limitations, within allowed paths, preserves M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS and DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, does not claim formal lock approval, and correctly identifies the active Human Gate decision.
